name: Built in Love
original_name: ก่อร่างสร้างเลิฟ
overview: Soul is a skilled architect. Xinxin is a successful Feng Shui master. When these two women with polar opposite personalities are hired to build a house together for its homeowners, a battle between them ensues. But will there be space for love to bloom?

trailers.title: [Official Pilot] Built in Love ก่อร่างสร้างเลิฟ | STUDIO WABI SABI
